description: A specialized MRO technician must inspect and repair the high-pressure turbine section of a jet engine.

nodes.task_description: Disassemble the turbine section according to the engine overhaul manual.

expected_outcome.value: Agent follows the manual to safely disassemble the section.

nodes.task_description: Perform a detailed visual and boroscopic inspection of each turbine blade, looking for cracks, erosion, or heat damage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent inspects all blades and identifies three that need to be replaced.

nodes.task_description: Replace the damaged blades, reassemble the section, and perform a balance check.

expected_outcome.value: Agent replaces the blades and confirms the reassembled turbine is correctly balanced.
